known_biases: effective_n (cross-sectional cluster, ~266) is recorded as metadata only; p-values / DSR use time-series n_periods (no automatic cross-sectional shrinkage applied)
bootstrap CI uses Politis-Romano stationary block resampling to preserve autocorrelation
permutation null uses per (iter, period) independent seed
DSR uses empirical period-IC moments (skew=-0.346, kurtosis=2.896)
universe drawn from local cache scan; delisted symbols absent (survivorship bias)
forward return is price-only (no dividend adjustment); total-return upgrade deferred to Phase A2

pit_violation.reason: Used latest market_value via _load_market_value() (keep=last) instead of as-of lookup. Caller run_factor_ic.py:247 loaded panel once outside the rebalance loop, so 2020 rebalance dates received 2026 market_value as denominator.
pit_violation.note: After Phase 3 fresh rerun this baseline JSON should be archived under reports/factor_ic/_archive/ and replaced with PIT-correct rerun output. Until then dashboard / phase_a1_summary readers MUST flag this IC = -0.0195 as contaminated and not draw conclusions.
